title: Delete a Business Messaging Webhook configuration
content:
Use this endpoint to delete an existing configuration for Business Messaging Webhook events at the developer app level. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/webhook/delete/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type.
Allowed format: `application/json`. | ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |--- |--- |--- | | app_id {Required} | string | ID of your developer application.

To find the App ID, navigate to [My Apps](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/apps/) > App Detail > Basic Information. | | secret {Required} | string | Secret of your developer application.

To find the Secret, navigate to [My Apps](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/apps/) > App Detail > Basic Information. | | event_type {Required} | string | The type of Webhook event configuration that you want to delete.

Enum value:
  • `DIRECT_MESSAGE`: Business Messaging events.
    • To learn more about the schema and sample payload of the events within this event category, see [Webhook schema](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832190670631937#item-link-Webhook%20schema).
| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/webhook/delete/' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data '{ "app_id": "{{app_id}}", "secret": "{{secret}}", "event_type": "DIRECT_MESSAGE" }' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix-Return Code](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message|string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request. | |data |object|Returned data.| #| app_id | string | ID of your developer application. | #| event_type| string | The type of Webhook event that you subscribe to.

Enum value:
  • `DIRECT_MESSAGE`: Business Messaging events.
    • To learn more about the schema and sample payload of the events within this event category, see [Webhook schema](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832190670631937#item-link-Webhook%20schema).
| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "app_id": "{{app_id}}", "event_type": "DIRECT_MESSAGE" } } (/code) ```
